description: Twilio WhatsApp Content template metadata for the Patient Retention Engine. Runtime variables are mapped into Twilio ContentVariables.

templates.message: Hi {{patient_name}}, welcome to {{clinic_name}}. We have registered your visit with {{doctor_name}}. Your follow-up date is {{follow_up_date}}. Reply YES if this looks correct or RESCHEDULE if you need help.
templates.notes: Patient-facing first message after QR intake. Matches existing Twilio patient_onboarding card: {{1}} patient, {{2}} clinic, {{3}} doctor, {{4}} follow-up date.

templates.message: Hi {{hospital_name}}, your onboarding for {{facility_type}} is complete. We have registered {{doctor_name}} as the primary contact and {{city}} as the facility location. Reply CONFIRM if this is correct or EDIT if you need changes.
templates.notes: Admin/ops card for newly boarded hospitals. Matches existing Twilio hospital_onboarding card: {{1}} hospital, {{2}} facility type, {{3}} doctor/contact, {{4}} city.

templates.trigger: Appointment reminder, missed follow-up, health check, or reactivation event
templates.message: Hi {{patient_name}}, this is a care reminder from {{clinic_name}} for your appointment with {{doctor_name}}. {{reminder_detail}} Reply YES to confirm, RESCHEDULE to change, or HELP if you need support.
templates.notes: Reusable patient reminder card. The workflow should fill reminder_detail with tomorrow/today/missed/health-check context.

templates.message: Hi {{patient_name}}, it is time for {{medicine_name}}. Dose: {{dosage}}. Timing: {{timing}}. {{instruction}} Reply TAKEN once done or HELP if you have a concern.
templates.notes: Patient-facing medication adherence reminder. Requires a scheduling workflow before runtime use.

templates.trigger: Doctor issues prescription PDF after consultation
templates.message: Hi {{patient_name}}, your prescription from {{doctor_name}} at {{clinic_name}} is ready. Medicines: {{medicine_summary}}. Open prescription: {{pdf_url}}
templates.notes: Post-consultation prescription card. WF13 maps {{1}} patient, {{2}} doctor, {{3}} clinic, {{4}} medicine summary, {{5}} PDF URL.

templates.message:
Thank you, {{name}}! ✅ We've noted that you'll be coming in for your appointment. See you then!

If anything changes, feel free to message us.
templates.notes: Auto-reply sent within 24h session window (no template approval needed). Sent only when patient confirms.

templates.message:
Hi {{name}}, no problem at all! 😊 We've noted that you'd like to reschedule. A member of our team will reach out to you shortly to arrange a new time.

Thank you for letting us know!
templates.notes: Auto-reply for cancellations. Notifies patient that staff will follow up. Does NOT auto-schedule.
Sent to admin WhatsApp number only. Not patient-facing.

twilio_template_categories.UTILITY: Transactional messages tied to a patient action or appointment.
twilio_template_categories.MARKETING: Re-engagement or promotional messages. Confirm opt-in and approval before production.
